name: Board
description: Board is a self-hostable visual bookmark and inspiration board. Capture URLs into typed, per-board collections with screenshots, full-text search, and optional AI enrichment. Runs fully without AI by default; enable a local CLI or OpenAI-compatible provider via the .env.

notes.text: Board runs without AI by default. To enable enrichment, edit /opt/board/.env (set LLM_AGENT for a local CLI, or LLM_BASE_URL + LLM_MODEL + LLM_API_KEY for an OpenAI-compatible API) and run: systemctl restart board
URL capture uses headless Chromium (installed as a dependency). On Debian it is autodetected; no extra configuration is required.
